base.$description: The size, as a factor of the root font size, to use as the basis for the scale, and the font size at step 4.

ratio.$description: The ratio used to calculate each step in the scale. Must be larger than 1 (a ratio of 1 would make all font sizes the same, while a number between 0 and 1 effectively inverts the scale). Larger numbers result in a larger font-size.10 and a smaller font-size.1.
